pageTitle: Wayne Rutter | Dudley Golf Club Digital Museum
summary: Wayne Rutter has played 2 recorded competitions in the Digital Museum. Wayne Rutter has recorded 1 win, with 1 runner-up finish and 2 top-three finishes. Wayne Rutter's strongest competition so far is Club Championship. Current Hall of Fame status: Emerging Candidate with a score of 73.

curator.biography: Wayne Rutter has competed in 2 recorded competitions. The player has won 1 competition. 1 runner-up finish has also been recorded. 2 top-three finishs demonstrates consistent performance. Current Hall of Fame status: Building Record.
curator.hallOfFameCitation: Wayne Rutter currently holds a Hall of Fame score of 23 and is classified as Building Record.
